india_trends.title: Infosys share price tumbles 3.5% after Q4 results as weak FY27 guidance dents sentiment - What are brokerages saying?
india_trends.summary: Infosys shares fell 3.5% to ₹1198.80 after Q4 results showed strong profits but weak guidance for FY27, predicting 1.5-3.5% revenue growth. Concerns about near-term growth and declining deal economics impacted investor sentiment despite a 21% YoY profit increase.
